comment: curated quiz-culture / trivia-history pack for '!b trivia about trivia' — the meta-topic is common enough to deserve grounded, verified questions instead of the world-knowledge AI path. every fact web-verified before shipping; launches with NO verify pass, so accuracy is non-negotiable (same doctrine as kripp-trivia.json).

questions.question: The word 'trivia' comes from the Latin 'trivium', literally meaning what?
In medieval schools, the trivium covered grammar, rhetoric, and what third subject?
In Roman myth, Trivia — goddess of witchcraft and crossroads — was the Roman name for which Greek goddess?
Which board game about answering questions was created by two Canadian journalists in 1979?
Trivial Pursuit was invented in which country?
How many wedges fill a completed Trivial Pursuit 'pie'?
In classic Trivial Pursuit, the orange wedge is which category?
A trivia encyclopedia author sued Trivial Pursuit after spotting his own planted fake fact — a phony first name for which TV detective?
On which quiz show must contestants phrase their response in the form of a question?
Who created Jeopardy! (and also Wheel of Fortune)?
Jeopardy!'s famous 'Think!' countdown music was composed by whom?
Who hosted Jeopardy! from 1984 until 2020?
Alex Trebek was born in which country?
On Jeopardy!, what's the hidden clue called that lets you wager your own money?
How many consecutive Jeopardy! games did Ken Jennings win in 2004?
Which IBM computer beat Ken Jennings and Brad Rutter at Jeopardy! in 2011?
IBM's Jeopardy!-winning computer Watson is named after whom?
Who won Jeopardy! The Greatest of All Time in 2020?
Which Jeopardy! champ built huge one-game totals with big wagers, thanks to his day job as a sports gambler?
Amy Schneider's 40-game Jeopardy! streak in 2021-22 is second only to whose?
'Potent Potables' is a recurring Jeopardy! category about what?
In SNL's Celebrity Jeopardy sketches, Darrell Hammond tormented Trebek as which actor?
'Is that your final answer?' is the catchphrase of which quiz show?
questions.answer: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire
accept: who wants to be a millionaire?

questions.question: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire first aired in 1998 in which country?
Name one of the three original lifelines on Who Wants to Be a Millionaire.
questions.answer: any of: Phone a Friend, 50:50, Ask the Audience

questions.question: The first US Millionaire top-prize winner hit the last question with all three lifelines intact, then phoned his dad just to say he'd win. Name him.
A British Army major coughed his way to the 2001 Millionaire top prize (and a conviction). Name him.
The 2020 ITV drama 'Quiz' dramatized a cheating scandal on which game show?
questions.answer: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire

questions.question: Which 2008 Best Picture Oscar winner follows a Mumbai teen acing India's Millionaire?
Herb Stempel was ordered to 'take a dive' on which rigged 1950s quiz show?
Which Columbia University lecturer became the famous cheating champion of Twenty-One?
Robert Redford's 1994 film about the Twenty-One scandal is titled what?
Which 1950s quiz show's top prize was right there in its name?
Which record book was founded in 1955 to settle arguments in British pubs?
The pub quiz as a weekly institution took off in the 1970s in which country?
Which British quiz show puts contestants in a black chair under a spotlight?
'I've started so I'll finish' comes from which British quiz show?
Who was the original host of Mastermind?
'Your starter for ten' is the signature line of which British student quiz?
Who was the original host of University Challenge?
'You are the weakest link, goodbye' — which quiz show?
Who was the famously rude original host of The Weakest Link?
Stephen Fry spent 13 years hosting which BBC panel show that rewards 'quite interesting' answers?
On which BBC quiz show is the perfect answer worth zero points?
Mark 'The Beast' Labbett hunts down quizzers on which show?
Victoria Coren Mitchell hosts which famously fiendish BBC connections quiz?
Pointless was co-created by which presenter, who later fronted his own teatime quiz, House of Games?
Which future late-night host was the original co-host on Win Ben Stein's Money?
Which comedian hosted Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?
Which TV trivia show ambushed passengers inside a New York taxi?
'Survey says!' — which long-running game show?
Which live mobile trivia app blew up in 2017-18 with real cash prizes and host 'Quiz Daddy'?
HQ Trivia host Scott Rogowsky went by what nickname?
Spin-the-wheel app Trivia Crack was made by Etermax, a studio from which country?
Quiz platform Kahoot! comes from which country?
Which sarcastic 1995 CD-ROM trivia series later spawned the Jackbox Party Packs?
Which Jackbox trivia game punishes wrong answers with deadly minigames?
Brad Rutter held the all-time game-show winnings record for over a decade, almost all earned on which show?
Trivial Pursuit's two inventors both worked in what profession?
The modern 'trivia' craze of nostalgic-facts contests started in 1965 at which university?
The 1953 radio quiz pitting university teams, which later dropped a word to become TV's 'GE College Bowl', was called what?
The Millionaire format has been licensed to roughly how many countries — 10, 50, or 100+?
